title: Replit Deck
description: Key design elements for Replit-inspired helix decks, product memos, launch chapters, and distinctive developer storytelling decks.

question_templates.question: 这套 Replit 风格 deck 用于什么：产品发布、内部提案、投资人故事、开发者分享？
叙事更偏 helix chapter、founder memo、产品路线图，还是 campaign pitch？
是否已有文案、代码片段、截图或章节结构？
是否要使用终端、代码、网格、粗边框、模块化卡片等视觉母题？

defaults.primary_user: developer, founder, or product audience watching a Replit-inspired story deck
defaults.business_domain: developer tools storytelling and product presentations
defaults.decision_goal: tell a distinctive developer story that leads to adoption, alignment, or a launch action
defaults.visual_direction: Replit Slides-inspired deck using code motifs, modular frames, strong contrast, and playful developer texture
